title: Edge Inference — Apple Neural Engine, Qualcomm Hexagon, WebGPU/WebLLM, Jetson

questions.question: What is the core constraint that makes mobile LLM inference slower than datacenter, per the lesson?
questions.question_zh: 本课认为，让移动端 LLM 推理慢于数据中心的核心瓶颈是什么？
options: Memory bandwidth (mobile DRAM at 50-90 GB/s vs HBM3 at 2-3 TB/s)
options_zh: 显存带宽（移动 DRAM 50-90 GB/s 对比 HBM3 的 2-3 TB/s）

questions.question: Why does Apple's Neural Engine avoid CPU-NPU copy overhead?
questions.question_zh: 苹果的 Neural Engine 为什么能省去 CPU 到 NPU 的拷贝开销？
options: It transcodes weights to FP4 before copy
Apple Silicon ships unified memory — CPU and ANE share the same pool
options_zh: Core ML 禁用了 KV cache
拷贝前先把权重转成 FP4
Apple Silicon 自带 unified memory — CPU 和 ANE 共享同一块内存池

questions.question: Which quantization format does the lesson recommend for WebGPU + WebLLM in the browser?
questions.question_zh: 对于浏览器中的 WebGPU + WebLLM，本课推荐哪种量化格式？
options: Q4 MLC (q4f16_1) compiled via mlc_llm convert_weight
options_zh: 通过 mlc_llm convert_weight 编译的 Q4 MLC（q4f16_1）

questions.question: Roughly what WebGPU mobile coverage does the lesson report for 2026?
questions.question_zh: 本课报告 2026 年 WebGPU 在移动端的覆盖率大约是多少？
options: About 70-75%, with Firefox Android still catching up

questions.question: Why is keeping 128K context impractical on a typical phone?
questions.question_zh: 为什么在普通手机上保留 128K 上下文不现实？
options: Model weights plus KV cache for 32K tokens plus OS overhead easily exceed the 8 GB RAM budget
options_zh: tokenizer 在 8K 以上会失败
模型权重 + 32K tokens 的 KV cache + 操作系统开销，很容易就超过 8 GB 的 RAM 预算

questions.question: Why is voice highlighted as the killer app for edge inference?
questions.question_zh: 为什么语音被本课点名为边缘推理的杀手级应用？
options: Voice agents are latency-sensitive (first token < 500 ms) and local inference eliminates network latency entirely
Voice models do not need KV cache
Voice models always fit in 50 MB
options_zh: 语音 agent 对延迟极其敏感（首 token < 500 ms），本地推理可以彻底消除网络延迟
语音模型不需要 KV cache
语音模型一定能塞进 50 MB
语音只能在 WebAssembly 里跑
